title: limodorum maculatum
intro: Limodorum maculatum, also known as the spotted orchid or greater butterfly orchid, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain iridoid glycosides that have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Limodorum maculatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce muscle spasms and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots to be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with other medications.
